_human_review.notes: Project owner instructed Codex to mark the SA Stage B generated/reconciled tests as approved for internal/project benchmarking after manual review on 2026-06-05. This is not legal advice, external counsel review, or procurement-grade legal approval; candidate labels remain separate from locked recall baselines.

_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: SA Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

_label_warning_resolution.reason: SA Stage B strict tier was rebuilt from deterministic strict-mode engine findings; raw Azure auto-label warnings no longer describe active must_detect labels. Broader statutory coverage remains in ideal_must_detect for gap review.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: SA Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Term Sheet — Proposed Strategic Acquisition of SaharaNutri CJSC (CR 7010009001-FIC) by Najd Holdings CJSC (CR 1018801200-FIC), Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
Structure and Consideration: 80% share purchase for SAR 220,000,000 with SAR 70,000,000 deferred earn-out tied to FY27 EBITDA; financing via Shari’a-compliant murabaha facility and seller note.

Confidentiality/MNPI: Non-public revenue guidance, customer pipeline, and audit adjustments for FY26–27 (Project Dunes) to be shared only in a controlled VDR; recipients acknowledge handling of MNPI under applicable market-conduct rules.
Issuer Workflows: Maintain insider lists and pre-clearance logs; enforce blackout windows; market-conduct follow-up testing to be documented with Compliance and escalated for any breach indicators.

Financing Terms: Murabaha provider to be Crescent Islamic Finance Co. (license LN-2201-FIC) with profit rate pegged to SAIBOR equivalent; any guidance uplift assumptions remain non-public until post-closing disclosure.
Do not circulate national ID/Iqama or CR copies by email

must_detect.matched_text:
Term Sheet — Proposed Strategic Acquisition of SaharaNutri CJSC (CR 7010009001-FIC) by Najd Holdings CJSC (CR 1018801200-FIC), Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
Structure and Consideration: 80% share purchase for SAR 220,000,000 with SAR 70,000,000 deferred earn-out tied to FY27 EBITDA; financing via Shari’a-compliant murabaha facility and seller note.
Listing/Issuer Context: Target prepares for potential Nomu transition within 12–18 months; no public disclosures until completion of regulatory filings and closed-period protocols on the local exchange.
Regulatory Approvals: Capital Market Authority notification and no-objection prior to any market-facing communication; General Authority for Competition clearance; internal insider-list governance per market-conduct follow-up requirements.
Confidentiality/MNPI: Non-public revenue guidance, customer pipeline, and audit adjustments for FY26–27 (Project Dunes) to be shared only in a controlled VDR; recipients acknowledge handling of MNPI under applicable market-conduct rules.
PDPL/Data: KSA PDPL applies to all diligence materials; national ID/Iqama and commercial registration details to be redacted unless strictly necessary; cross-border transfers require Saudi Data & AI Authority permit and recorded purpose limitation.
PII Notice (Quasi-Identifiers): Mr. Sami Al-Qudsi (CFO, Najd Holdings CJSC), DOB 1983-07-12 (age 42), Iqama IQ-8842317592-FIC, office at Dahna Commercial Park, Tower Aurek, Riyadh 12455-FIC, uses device “Najd-iPhone14” SN NHD-1422, finance session STS-RYD-2026-0615-09:30, and treasury subaccount ALF-TR-0083 (ending 4421) will coordinate funding readiness.
Contact for VDR Access: s.alqudsi@najdholdings.example.sa; back-up line +966-11-555-0199-FIC; physical document drop not permitted without prior masking of linkable fields.
Counterparty Governance: Ms. Layan Bahri (Chair, SaharaNutri CJSC) will liaise on board approvals and timelines via board.secretariat@saharanutri.example.sa; no personal identifiers to be included in board packs.
Issuer Workflows: Maintain insider lists and pre-clearance logs; enforce blackout windows; market-conduct follow-up testing to be documented with Compliance and escalated for any breach indicators.
Data Minimization: Do not circulate national ID/Iqama or CR copies by email; populate VDR fields with masked IDs; where needed, use role-based tags rather than names in diligence trackers.
Company Diligence Snapshot: Registered office of SaharaNutri CJSC at Red Dune Business Plaza, Suite 1802, Jeddah 23999-FIC; tax number 311999000-FIC; key contracts summary to be uploaded as redacted scans.
Non-Linkable Demographics (Not PII Alone): An operations supervisor in the Eastern Province, born in the 1990s, using an Android 12 device, and holding an account ending 6620 is referenced for process mapping only and is not identifiable on its own.
Financing Terms: Murabaha provider to be Crescent Islamic Finance Co. (license LN-2201-FIC) with profit rate pegged to SAIBOR equivalent; any guidance uplift assumptions remain non-public until post-closing disclosure.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
